name: glassbox-harness
description: Harness tooling for building Glassbox under its own observation: guardrail hooks (no-network, no-raw-transcript, verify-on-stop, tool-use log, session-start), the schema-investigator / slice-implementer / metric-author agents, repo skills, and dev-time-only MCP servers. Enforces the no-network, zero-dependency, single-boundary rules (OBJ-5).
